data.body:
4214 (merge-gate) plan-review BLOCKed x5: 'mirrors' vague, fixture undefined, no output artifact for CI-trigger/call-site audit, and — the real gap — NO defined storage shape or CLI symbol for an op-cert-on-a-ticket to verify. Resolution (grounded): DEFINED op-cert storage shape = DSSE envelope in the attestations record (kind plan-review/completion-verifier), asymmetric variant of today's HMAC record, carrying {ticket_id,material_fingerprint,merged_log_commit}. Scoped 4214 as VERIFY-SIDE + grandfathered (ENFORCE_SINCE advisory until producers land) so it doesn't require the producer (which is ee0b trusted-server + 8f1d local-gate migration). New CLI rebar verify-opcert walks merged log + verifies via trusted_env.verify_required_environment; op-cert step added to verify-identity.yaml (same walk); fixture test + CI-trigger audit comment artifact. Re-review running bf3kpa9hw.
NOTE: op-cert PRODUCER/storage integration (gates minting asymmetric op-certs onto tickets) is cross-child (ee0b+8f1d) and was under-specified in the decomposition — flagging as I reach those.
IN FLIGHT: 42d1 make test bk1uhybdx; 4214 re-review bf3kpa9hw; 650 CI pending.
